cannot_assert: Colour intensity is model-derived aggregate weight and does not prove physical or causal communication.
confirmed: Rows are senders, columns are receivers, and the sequential colour scale maps the untransformed full aggregate CellChat net weight matrix.
interpretable: All sender and receiver labels and the weight scale are legible; high-weight receiver columns are easy to compare.
recommendation: Keep as the most compact quantitative overview of aggregate inferred weights.
visible: The complete 9 by 9 matrix, title, sender axis, receiver labels, and legend are visible without clipping.
